text: Being here, between glass-walled rooms and vibrant displays, I sense a pulse of curiosity and collective inquiry. The transparency of glass suggests openness, yet also a subtle divide between observer and participant. In the second image, the bold 'R+D' and the words about connecting and coexisting with intelligent systems ignite my contemplative spirit—how much do our own inquiries mirror the development processes we inscribe on walls? I feel both invited forward and quietly reflective, as if standing at the threshold of innovation and introspection.
